title: Slenderman: The Revival
body:
# **Slenderman: The Revival**
Adds the Slender Forest Biome & Slenderman!

![Requires Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca66f9781ac31717a451a5d92caf6ea4ff4e682c.png)

## Description
How to visit Slenderman:

- Locate a "Slender Forest" biome
- Locate structures in this biome
- Destroy a Page.
- There is a chance (depending on difficulty) that destroying a page will grant the "Slender Attraction" effect which will have around a 0.1% chance per in-game tick to spawn Slenderman near the player.
 

## Slenderman will:

- Stalk player by following/teleporting near them (if in the "Slender Forest" biome)
- Attack you if you look in his direction after some time stalking (if in the "Slender Forest" biome)
- Climb up pillars (how high depends on difficulty)
- If you leave the "Slender Forest" biome, he will despawn after 30 seconds


YOU NEED TO BE PREPARED TO FIGHT HIM! With the statics it can be quite hard to see so gear up, the fight's tough!

## Other details:

- Slenderman may spawn "Victim's Ghost" if killed, which can drop "Slender Souls"
- You can craft the "Slender Sword" with "Victim's Souls", this will grant the "Slender Attraction" effect that will spawn Slenderman in the "Slender Forest" biome. Also does 18 attack damage.
- You can craft the "Slender Mask" with "Victim's Souls", this will stop Slenderman getting angry at you (unless you attack him). Also prevents Slender Statics.

 I only release downloads of my mods via [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/hqrvester/projects), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Hqrvester) and [my website](https://hqrvester.jimdofree.com/minecraft/), please do not download from anywhere else as they may contain viruses!!

## Credits:

- Mod based on the games: "Slenderman: The Eight Pages" & "Slender: The Arrival" by Blue Isle Studios & Parsec Productions.
- Mod was inspired by the Slenderman mod by Colossali.
- Mod was created using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/), a mod-making tool by Pylo.
